title: Portolan Netherlands
summary: Dutch geospatial data from the Portolan SDI project, including administrative boundaries, buildings, and infrastructure for the Netherlands.

title: Belgium Buildings
summary: Building footprints for Belgium, derived from open government data sources.

title: Pergamino IDE
summary: 187 open geospatial datasets from the Municipality of Pergamino, Argentina — cadastral, infrastructure, transit, agriculture, census, and more.
